'''Tedryn''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who lived prior to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. They were a [[Gatekeeper/Legends|Gatekeeper]] of the [[Tedryn Holocron]], which was named after them.<ref name="JvS" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]] {{1stm}}
